messages.author: RichG
messages.text: Feeling kind of stupid this morning... I have a Heltec V4 flashed with Companion 1.14.1. Trying to check some settings like "get radio.rxgain", but I can't even get a response from it. I tried working with Gemini to find why and that's just frustrating. Can anyone help?
messages.content_html: Feeling kind of stupid this morning... I have a Heltec V4 flashed with Companion 1.14.1. Trying to check some settings like "get radio.rxgain", but I can't even get a response from it. I tried working with Gemini to find why and that's just frustrating. Can anyone help?

messages.author: dandri
messages.text: That is for a repeater firmware
messages.content_html: That is for a repeater firmware

messages.author: RichG
messages.text: So the Campion firmware doesn't have an issue with rxgain?
messages.content_html: So the Campion firmware doesn't have an issue with rxgain?
